aibooks.title: Create Picture Book
aibooks.promptPlaceholder: Please enter your creative idea, for example: A little girl meets a friendly little rabbit in the forest, and they explore a mysterious garden together
aibooks.characterCardHint: Maintain all characters here. At image time, only characters appearing on that page are injected. Prefix a scene with「出场角色：A、B」for best matching. Text and/or reference image.

aibooks.characterCardOrRefRequired: Fill in the character card or upload a character reference image
aibooks.characterRefOptional: Character reference image (optional; overrides page-1 anchor)
aibooks.consistencyHint: Only in-scene characters are added per page. Characters not mentioned on that page are omitted from the image prompt.

aibooks.step1: 1. Enter story outline, generate story scenes
aibooks.step2: 2. Edit story scenes, generate picture book

minimalPopArt.elementDetails: Minimal flat illustration, contemporary soothing aesthetic, thick black hand-drawn outlines, large flat solid-color backgrounds, cel-shaded flats, no shadows, lazy subdued expressions, rounded cute linework, pop-art color pairings, vector-illustration feel, high quality, high saturation

healingWatercolor.elementDetails: Watercolor texture, fresh and soft tones, creating a calm and healing atmosphere.

penLineArt.elementDetails: Rich details, black and white lines, full composition, bright lighting.

colorfulOutlineRomanticism.elementDetails: Colorful outline illustration, unrestrained atmosphere, vivid colors and loose brushstrokes, playful and carefree scenes.

crayonNoiseHandDrawn.elementDetails: Crayon brush style, rough granular texture with irregular edges, simple hand-drawn feel. Warm soft tones as the base, adding noise effects to the image, replacing gradients with particle density.

vintageSketch.elementDetails: Hand-drawn colored sketches, rough lines, heavy textured brushstrokes, beige warm-toned background, vintage children's book style.

pixarStyle.elementDetails: High-quality 3D rendering, soft materials, studio effects, vivid expressions and movements.

engravingLines.elementDetails: Colorful images, exquisite lines, 0.01mm lines, using dots and lines to express light and shadow relationships, master-level line arrangement, detailed details, high-definition quality.

pencilSketch3D.elementDetails: Hand-drawn pencil sketch style, 3D design perspective, centered composition.

feltCollage.elementDetails: Handmade texture, bright colors, with decorative patterns such as polka dots and stripes, yellow background with white polka dots, material showing felt texture and thickness, cartoon-exaggerated character shapes.

collageIllustration.elementDetails: Paper collage style, showing flat perspective and texture through the use of clear shapes and color blocks. Overall atmosphere is cheerful and joyful, bright colors, lively and playful style.

doodleSoul.elementDetails: White background, minimalist, nine-grid layout, hand-drawn line art, doodle style, Prussian blue line outline, mixed creation of colored pencils and watercolors, manuscript texture, fun, Raymond Briggs style.

abstractFlatDesign.elementDetails: Stylized shapes, bright colors, cartoon-like visual effects, soft beige sky, evenly distributed light, calm and warm atmosphere, minimalist style.

simpleCartoon.elementDetails: Simple and bright, soft colors, pure white background, objects/characters have rounded bodies and short limbs.

oilPainting.elementDetails: Thick brushstrokes oil painting style, children's picture book, colorful light and shadow, clear brushstrokes, complex scenes, extreme details, ultra-high definition, 32k.

europeanComic.elementDetails: European comic style, clean simple linework, muted flat colors, richly detailed backgrounds.

gouacheChildrenBook.elementDetails: Thick opaque gouache paint texture, rounded cute silhouettes, warm soft color palette, hand-painted brushstrokes, picture-book publishing quality, narrative storytelling mood, cozy healing atmosphere, children's picture book illustration style.

nordicWhimsical.elementDetails: A playful hand-drawn illustration full of childlike wonder, with clean line art using only black, white, and light blue for a fresh, design-forward look. Quiet, cozy, and fairy-tale in mood, with a touch of surreal whimsy.

cozyNaiveFolkArt.elementDetails: Cozy everyday scene, hand-drawn illustration, Naive Art and Folk Art style, simple geometric shapes, children's picture-book texture, cute and soft, visible handmade texture and brushstrokes, decorative patterns, flat color blocks, limited palette (mainly red, light blue, white, gray), warm and healing, slice-of-life narrative, vintage craft atmosphere, clean minimalist composition, refined design sense, storytelling mood.

narrativeEditorialFolk.elementDetails: Narrative illustration, vintage editorial illustration style, modern folk art, naive art aesthetic, hand-drawn texture, visible grain, geometric simplified forms, warm color palette, clean composition, healing everyday life, story-rich mood, cute characters, soft natural light, refined minimalist beauty, picture-book quality, magazine illustration style, warm calm atmosphere, gallery-grade illustration quality.

blackWhiteDoodle.elementDetails: A dense doodle illustration filled with various cartoon-style black line-drawn images. These elements are arranged randomly and repetitively, creating a chaotic yet vibrant atmosphere. Characters have simple lines, rounded outlines, and various expressions, showing innocence and humor. The composition is compact with no obvious white space. The entire image uses only black and white, with sharp contrast, consistent line thickness, and unified style. Lighting is even with no shadows, presenting a flat visual effect. The overall style is cartoon, doodle, with childlike fun and creativity, creating a casual yet imaginative feeling.

rusticHandDrawn.elementDetails: White background, minimalist, nine-grid, soul artist, hand-drawn line art, doodle style, Prussian blue line outline, little girl, fun, picture book style, illustrations in the style of Raymond Briggs and Mattias Adolfsson, mixed creation of colored pencils and watercolors, manuscript, masterpiece.

maximalistCopperplate.elementDetails: Copperplate style, full-frame, maximalism, black thick lines with clear outlines, high saturation, high contrast, blue as the main tone creating a peaceful atmosphere, paired with orange and white, delicate texture, rich layers, shaping an elegant and natural picture. Through exquisite brushstrokes and color layers, creating a peaceful, fresh, poetic and romantic atmosphere, showing romantic beauty and artistic value, allowing viewers to immerse themselves in a peaceful and beautiful visual experience, maximalism, rich details, decorative patterns, sense of layers, sense of space, presenting a sacred feeling, stunning picture, high-definition, high detail.

keithHaringDoodle.elementDetails: Thick line marker illustration, black and white color scheme, white background, decorative doodle patterns.

hero.title: Creative Guides
hero.subtitle: No art skills? No problem—follow real screenshots from AI art to print-ready books in a few clear steps.

features.title: Creation workbench overview
features.subtitle: The four homepage entry points map to different creative paths—click through to try each one.

character.title: Character studio
character.desc: Generate and manage consistent characters, refine in the editor, or batch variant sheets for books and illustrations.

illustration.title: AI illustration
illustration.desc: Browse the style library, generate from a prompt, then collect favorites into My Illustrations for editing.

book.title: AI picture book
book.desc: Enter a storyboard, batch-generate pages, collect each page, then compose and export.

layout.title: Layout export
layout.desc: Order illustrations, publish as PDF, or switch to print layout for press-ready export.

cases.title: Before / After
cases.subtitle: Real UI screenshots at each stage—not stock placeholders.

aiIllustration.title: AI illustration: generate → collect
aiIllustration.summary: Pick a style and prompt on AI Illustration, then click Collect to save into My Illustrations.
aiIllustration.beforeDesc: AI Illustration: style browser on the left, live preview on the right.
aiIllustration.afterDesc: My Illustrations: saved pages ready to edit, download, or open in EditorPro.

editorLayout.title: My illustrations → EditorPro layout
editorLayout.summary: Open a saved page in EditorPro to set canvas size, apply picture-book layouts, and add text and assets.
editorLayout.beforeDesc: Single illustration in your library, not yet laid out for a book page.
editorLayout.afterDesc: EditorPro: canvas presets, layers, and picture-book layout templates.

bookPrint.title: Layout export → print layout PDF
bookPrint.summary: After ordering art in Layout Export, switch to Print Layout to fill the 32-page template and export PDF.
bookPrint.beforeDesc: Layout Export: choose Compose PDF or Print Layout and order pages.
bookPrint.afterDesc: Print Book Layout: fill endpapers, cover spread, and body spreads, then export PDF.

workflows.title: Workflow guides
workflows.subtitle: Three common paths with steps matched to real screenshots.

characterFlow.title: Create and reuse characters
characterFlow.intro: For stories that need one consistent cast: define the character, batch variants, then use across books and art.

steps.1: On Generate Character, enter name and description, pick style and ratio, then generate.
steps.2: Saved results appear in My Characters—edit metadata or open in the editor.
steps.3: For scene variants, use Character Group Images with a reference upload and variant prompts.
steps.4: Collect or download, then reuse in AI Books, AI Illustration, or EditorPro.

aiBookFlow.title: Complete a story with AI Books

steps.1: Enter your story prompt in AI Books and batch-generate pages with a chosen style.
steps.2: Collect each page; regenerate weak pages or refine in EditorPro.
steps.3: Manage collected books in My Picture Books—read, edit, or delete.
steps.4: Open Layout Export and order pages for reading.
steps.5: Choose Compose PDF to publish, or Print Layout for PrintBookLayout.

printPdfFlow.title: Export a print PDF with PrintBookLayout
printPdfFlow.intro: For physical printing: 32-page template, cover spread, and body spreads.

steps.1: In Layout Export, order illustrations and switch to Print Layout mode.
steps.2: Pick art from My Illustrations on the left, click page blocks on the right to fill.
steps.3: Set page ratio (1:1 / 3:4 / 2:1); spread blocks fill left and right together.
steps.4: Check endpapers, copyright, and body spreads; remove blank spreads if needed.
steps.5: Export PDF, or return to compose mode to download PDF / publish.

styles.title: AI style library
styles.subtitle: The homepage style gallery shows one theme in many art styles—pick wisely to save editing time.
styles.styleDemoAlt: Homepage style gallery: one fox theme in multiple AI styles
styles.styleDemoCaption: Same prompt across styles (screenshot from the homepage gallery).

sketch.name: Line / sketch
sketch.summary: Line and texture led, lots of whitespace—narrative, journals, science, vintage kids’ books.
sketch.topics: Coming-of-age stories, journal-style diaries, B&W or muted science, vintage picture books.
sketch.editTips: Avoid covering linework in large blocks; use thin frames or handwritten type; lasso close to stroke edges.

paint.name: Paint / watercolor / texture
paint.summary: Strong color and mood—bedtime, emotional, and gentle nature stories.
paint.topics: Bedtime, family and friendship, soft nature science, holiday cards.
paint.editTips: Skip harsh filters that break watercolor washes; light translucent text backgrounds; match color temperature on spreads.

toon.name: Cartoon / 3D / pop
toon.summary: Clear shapes and saturated color—young kids, character IP, series books.
toon.topics: Character series, funny daily life, preschool materials, brand IP extensions.
toon.editTips: Great for lasso stickers; add speech bubbles in EditorPro; keep outline weight consistent; don’t over-sharpen.

healingWatercolor.topics: Bedtime calm, small nature moments, emotional healing shorts.
healingWatercolor.editTips: Keep whitespace and soft edges; use warm off-white text blocks, not flat pure white.

minimalPopArt.topics: Minimal fables, mood pieces, modern kids’ magazine art.
minimalPopArt.editTips: Clean color edges suit bold titles; avoid heavy textures that fight the flat look.

vintageSketch.topics: Vintage fairy tales, classic literature for kids, nostalgic family albums.
vintageSketch.editTips: Paper tone is part of the style; don’t bleach to pure white; serif or script type fits best.

pixarStyle.topics: Adventure, friendship, family comedy with 3D characters.
pixarStyle.editTips: Lighting is already rich—focus edits on layout and bubbles; scaling can blur 3D material detail.

crayonNoiseHandDrawn.topics: Preschool daily life, doodle journals, craft-class records.
crayonNoiseHandDrawn.editTips: Grain is intentional—don’t over-denoise; keep irregular crayon edges when collaging stickers.

gouacheChildrenBook.topics: Classic narrative kids’ books, chapter stories, publisher samples.
gouacheChildrenBook.editTips: Clear gouache blocks pair well with layout frames; align color block edges on spreads.

penLineArt.topics: Detailed narrative, science cross-sections, objects and architecture.
penLineArt.editTips: Fine lines need zoomed editing; lasso just outside strokes so hatching isn’t clipped.

feltCollage.topics: Toddler learning, craft themes, holiday decorative pages.
feltCollage.editTips: Don’t sharpen felt texture; soft shadows OK—avoid hard drop shadows.

nordicWhimsical.topics: Nordic fairy tales, minimal characters, blue-white series.
nordicWhimsical.editTips: Limited palette—new elements in black, white, light blue; thin sans or geometric script for type.

cozyNaiveFolkArt.topics: Family daily life, folk holidays, cozy naive-art stories.
cozyNaiveFolkArt.editTips: Repeat decorative motifs in headers/footers; keep flat color and limited palette—skip gradient overlays.

contact.title: Contact
contact.wechatDesc: Submit children’s stories · Read original picture books · Parenting tips
contact.statement1: Notice: Some assets on this site are derivative works. Original images are from (https://www.freepik.com/ ; https://fresh-folk.com/ ) and used under their license terms. Respect copyright and source agreements when reusing.
contact.statement2: Picture books and related content belong to their original authors and are for non-commercial use only. Republishing, copying, quoting, or excerpting requires permission from the author or this site with attribution. Unauthorized use may incur legal liability.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed

wechatCallback.noCode: Authorization code not received, please login again
wechatCallback.invalidCode: Invalid or expired authorization code, please login again

wechatCallback.networkError: Network error, please check your network connection

hero.title: AI Children's Book Creator Program
hero.slogan: Every child deserves a picture book of their own.
hero.lead: Co-create an original book with AI, submit for review, get showcased, and become a Young Author.
hero.hint: Parents, teachers, and fans welcome · Minors submit via guardian account

why.title: Why create a picture book?
why.subtitle: Start from what you feel—use AI to make it simpler and more creative, and turn your story into a book together.
why.audience: Open to parents, children (via guardians), teachers, and fans—anywhere.

kid.title: Turn feelings into stories
kid.desc: Start from a child's everyday life, moods, and little wishes—put what matters to them into a book that's truly theirs.

family.title: AI makes it easier
family.desc: No drawing skills needed—AI helps with art and layout, so ideas become pages with less effort.

memory.title: Create together as a family
memory.desc: Shape the plot, pick images, and refine words side by side—a warm keepsake and time spent together.

submit.title: Four ways to submit
submit.subtitle: Pick the path that matches where you are in the creative process.

localBook.title: Already have a finished book
localBook.desc: Upload your PDF or image pages directly on the platform for review.

existingArt.title: Have illustrations only
existingArt.desc: Add text and layout in EditorPro on the site, then submit for review.

createOnSite.title: Create on KidStory
createOnSite.desc: Generate art, write your story, and lay out pages on the site—then submit.

email.title: Submit by email
email.desc: Send your book files to our official inbox. Use “Picture book submission” as the subject.

rewards.title: What you can get
rewards.subtitle: Approved books join the official library; each month we feature 3 with extra rewards and exposure.

library.label: All approved books
library.title: Official library · always on display
library.desc: Your book stays available for families to read—it is not removed after monthly picks.

featured.label: 3 featured picks per month
featured.title: Extra rewards & spotlight
featured.desc: Chosen from that month's approved books:
featured.footnote: Books not selected as monthly picks still remain in the library long-term.

items.original: Original work or proper license only—no famous IP or unauthorized assets.
items.guardian: Minors must submit through a guardian account with consent.
items.copyright: You keep copyright; you grant us display and promotion on official channels.
items.takedown: You may request removal anytime; submission does not guarantee selection or awards.

cta.title: Start your story today
cta.subtitle: Your first page is one click away.
cta.foot: Need help? See our creative guides
